title: Dutch Pancake with Caramelized Uni
description: A sweet and savory pancake recipe featuring caramelized uni and a dollop of whipped cream.
instructions: In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
Add the granulated sugar and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally, until caramelized.
Add the plump uni to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly browned.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the heavy cream and maple syrup until stiff peaks form.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter.
Cook the Dutch pancakes according to package instructions.
Serve the pancakes with the caramelized uni, whipped cream, and a sprinkle of kosher salt.
